mobile.notice_desc: BCT0902 is working hard on the Mobile UI. Currently, IRIS AI is optimized for the full PC experience only. Please bear with us!

testimonials.title: < TRUSTED_VOICES />
testimonials.subtitle: What people are saying about their IRIS AI experience.

1.name: Alex Johnson
1.content: IRIS AI has completely transformed how our team approaches debugging. The Chef Assistant logic is a game changer.

2.name: Sarah Chen
2.content: The aesthetic of the IRIS ecosystem is unparalleled. It's rare to see an AI suite that looks as good as it performs.

3.name: Marco Rossi
3.content: Youtube Smart Analyzer saved me hundreds of hours of manual transcription. Accurate, fast, and incredibly intuitive.

4.name: David Miller
4.content: The linguistic reasoning capabilities of IRIS go beyond expectations. It's a true digital partner for every coder.

5.name: Elena Petrova
5.content: I love the attention to every interface detail. IRIS is not just a tool; it's a digital masterpiece.

6.name: Kaito Tanaka
6.content: From Backend logic to Frontend fluidity, IRIS demonstrates an extremely high level of polish. Very impressed!

chronicles.title: < Personal_Chronicles />
chronicles.subtitle: A chronological sequence of growth and professional development.

m1.title: Elementary School
m1.desc: Studied at Tan Thanh 1 Primary School. The first steps in the educational journey.

m2.title: Middle School
m2.desc: Attended Tan Thanh Secondary School. Began developing independent learning habits.

m3.title: High School
m3.desc: Studied at Huynh Thuc Khang High School. A critical stage in preparing for the future.

m4.title: University
m4.desc: Student at Lac Hong University. Where professional IT knowledge began to accumulate.

m5.title: Technician @ FPT
m5.desc: Internship and employment at FPT Group. Gained technical experience in one of Vietnam's leading professional environments.

m6.title: IT @ Chính Nam Biên Hòa
m6.desc: Led IT initiatives at Chinh Nam Bien Hoa for 1 year and 7 months. Currently independent and available for new challenges.
